name: 1Password
tagline: Password manager and security platform for teams
description: 1Password is a leading password manager for individuals and businesses. It stores passwords, secrets, and sensitive data in an encrypted vault — and includes team-sharing features, SSO integrations, and developer tools for managing secrets in CI/CD pipelines.
pros: Best UX of any password manager
cons: Can be expensive for large teams
use_cases: You're a developer or DevOps engineer who needs to inject secrets into CI/CD pipelines and local environments via 1Password Secrets Automation
Your company is onboarding quickly and needs to provision shared vaults, enforce password policies, and revoke access centrally when staff leave
You travel internationally and need Travel Mode to hide sensitive vaults at border crossings without deleting them permanently
Your team uses SSO via Okta or Azure AD but also needs a password manager to cover apps that don't support SSO yet
